samples.xml_description:
```xml
<module id="multi_pipe_8bit">
    <description>Unsigned 8-bit multiplier implemented using pipelining. Utilizes clock (clk), active-low reset (rst_n), input enable (mul_en_in), and outputs enable (mul_en_out) and product (mul_out).</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal for synchronization.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal.</input>
        <input id="mul_en_in">Input enable signal for multiplication operation.</input>
        <input id="mul_a" width_description="[7:0]">Multiplicand input signal.</input>
        <input id="mul_b" width_description="[7:0]">Multiplier input signal.</input>
        <output id="mul_en_out">Output enable signal indicating multiplication operation status.</output>
        <output id="mul_out" width_description="[15:0]">Product output signal.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <state name="IDLE" value="2'b00"/>
        <state name="MULTIPLY" value="2'b01"/>
        <state name="OUTPUT" value="2'b10"/>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description type="sequential_logic">
        <register id="mul_en_out_reg" width="2" initial_value="2'b00">
            <next_state condition="clk & ~rst_n" next_state="IDLE"/>
            <next_state condition="clk & mul_en_in" next_state="MULTIPLY"/>
            <next_state condition="clk & ~mul_en_in" next_state="OUTPUT"/>
        </register>
        <register id="mul_a_reg" width="8" initial_value="8'h00">
            <next_state condition="clk & ~rst_n" next_state="IDLE"/>
            <next_state condition="clk & mul_en_in" next_state="MULTIPLY"/>
            <next_state condition="clk & ~mul_en_in" next_state="OUTPUT"/>
        </register>
        <register id="mul_b_reg" width="8" initial_value="8'h00">
            <next_state condition="clk & ~rst_n" next_state="IDLE"/>
            <next_state condition="clk & mul_en_in" next_state="MULTIPLY"/>
            <next_state condition="clk & ~mul_en_in" next_state="OUTPUT"/>
        </register>
        <register id="temp[0]" width="9" initial_value="9'h000">
            <next_state condition="clk & ~rst_n" next_state="IDLE"/>
            <next_state condition="clk & mul_en_in" next_state="MULTIPLY"/>
            <next_state condition="clk & ~mul_en_in" next_state="OUTPUT"/>
        </register>
        <register id="temp[1]" width="9" initial_value="9'h000">
            <next_state condition="clk & ~rst_n" next_state="IDLE"/>
            <next_state condition="clk & mul_en_in" next_state="MULTIPLY"/>
            <next_state condition="clk & ~mul_en_in" next_state="OUTPUT"/>
        </register>
        <register id="temp[2]" width="9" initial_value="9'h000">
            <next_state condition="clk & ~rst_n" next_state="IDLE"/>
            <next_state condition="clk & mul_en_in" next_state="MULTIPLY"/>
            <next_state condition="clk & ~mul_en_in" next_state="OUTPUT"/>
        </register>
        <register id="temp[3]" width="9" initial_value="9'h000">
            <next_state condition="clk & ~rst_n" next_state="IDLE"/>
            <next_state condition="clk & mul_en_in" next_state="MULTIPLY"/>
            <next_state condition="clk & ~mul_en_in" next_state="OUTPUT"/>
        </register>
        <register id="temp[4]" width="9" initial_value="9'h000">
            <next_state condition="clk & ~rst_n" next_state="IDLE"/>
            <next_state condition="clk & mul_en_in" next_state="MULTIPLY"/>
            <next_state condition="clk & ~mul_en_in" next_state="OUTPUT"/>
        </register>
        <register id="temp[5]" width="9" initial_value="9'h000">
            <next_state condition="clk & ~rst_n" next_state="IDLE"/>
            <next_state condition="clk & mul_en_in" next_state="MULTIPLY"/>
            <next_state condition="clk & ~mul_en_in" next_state="OUTPUT"/>
        </register>
        <register id="temp[6]" width="9" initial_value="9'h000">
            <next_state condition="clk & ~rst_n" next_state="IDLE"/>
            <next_state condition="clk & mul_en_in" next_state="MULTIPLY"/>
            <next_state condition="clk & ~mul_en_in" next_state="OUTPUT"/>
        </register>
        <register id="temp[7]" width="9" initial_value="9'h000">
            <next_state condition="clk & ~rst_n" next_state="IDLE"/>
            <next_state condition="clk & mul_en_in" next_state="MULTIPLY"/>
            <next_state condition="clk & ~mul_en_in" next_state="OUTPUT"/>
        </register>
        <register id="sum[0]" width="9" initial_value="9'h000">
            <next_state condition="clk & ~rst_n" next_state="IDLE"/>
            <next_state condition="clk & mul_en_in" next_state="MULTIPLY"/>
            <next_state condition="clk & ~mul_en_in" next_state="OUTPUT"/>
        </register>
        <register id="sum[1]" width="9" initial_value="9'h000">
            <next_state condition="clk & ~rst_n" next_state="IDLE"/>
            <next_state condition="clk & mul_en_in" next_state="MULTIPLY"/>
            <next_state condition="clk & ~mul_en_in" next_state="OUTPUT"/>
        </register>
        <register id="sum[2]" width="9" initial_value="9'h000">
            <next_state condition="clk & ~rst_n" next_state="IDLE"/>
            <next_state condition="clk & mul_en_in" next_state="MULTIPLY"/>
            <next_state condition="clk & ~mul_en_in" next_state="OUTPUT"/>
        </register>
        <register id="sum[3]" width="9" initial_value="9'h000">
            <next_state condition="clk & ~rst_n" next_state="IDLE"/>
            <next_state condition="clk & mul_en_in" next_state="MULTIPLY"/>
            <next_state condition="clk & ~mul_en_in" next_state="OUTPUT"/>
        </register>
        <register id="mul_out_reg" width="16" initial_value="16'h0000">
            <next_state condition="clk & ~rst_n" next_state="IDLE"/>
            <next_state condition="clk & mul_en_in" next_state="MULTIPLY"/>
            <next_state condition="clk & ~mul_en_in" next_state="OUTPUT"/>
        </register>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        // Input control
        always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if (!rst_n) begin
                mul_en_out_reg <= 2'b00;
            end else begin
                mul_en_out_reg <= {mul_en_out_reg[0], mul_en_in};
            end
        end
        
        // Input registers
        always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if (!rst_n) begin
                mul_a_reg <= 8'h00;
                mul_b_reg <= 8'h00;
            end else if (mul_en_in) begin
                mul_a_reg <= mul_a;
                mul_b_reg <= mul_b;
            end
        end
        
        // Partial product generation
        assign temp[0] = mul_a_reg * mul_b_reg[0];
        assign temp[1] = mul_a_reg * mul_b_reg[1];
        assign temp[2] = mul_a_reg * mul_b_reg[2];
        assign temp[3] = mul_a_reg * mul_b_reg[3];
        assign temp[4] = mul_a_reg * mul_b_reg[4];
        assign temp[5] = mul_a_reg * mul_b_reg[5];
        assign temp[6] = mul_a_reg * mul_b_reg[6];
        assign temp[7] = mul_a_reg * mul_b_reg[7];
        
        // Partial sum calculation
        always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if (!rst_n) begin
                sum[0] <= 9'h000;
                sum[1] <= 9'h000;
                sum[2] <= 9'h000;
                sum[3] <= 9'h000;
            end else begin
                sum[0] <= temp[0];
                sum[1] <= sum[0] + temp[1];
                sum[2] <= sum[1] + temp[2];
                sum[3] <= sum[2] + temp[3];
            end
        end
        
        // Final product calculation
        always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if (!rst_n) begin
                mul_out_reg
